text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap has managed to leave quite a mark on
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To mark the occasion, I've planned a special
event for her. After all, I also enjoyed every
moment helping Oguri Cap achieve her dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At long last, the big day has arrived...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey, um... where exactly are we going?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Keeping my eyes closed like this makes me feel
kinda uneasy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Really? Okay then...

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Oguri! Oguri! Oguri! Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stands are overflowing with people, all
chanting Oguri Cap's name.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Great job in all your races, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Wooo! You're so cool, Ogurin!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Uhh... What's going on here?
choice_data_list: All these people have come here to see you.
All these people have come here to see you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: They're all here to see me? This many people?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's thanks to her supporters that she's been able to keep on running—which led me to think about what I could do for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What would make Oguri Cap the happiest? When
I asked myself that question, I knew there was
only one answer—to show her the faces of all her
supporters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Why? Because every fan calling out her name
means the world to her.
choice_data_list: This event is all for you!
This event is all for you!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...All for me? Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Ahaha! You've got a lot of pull!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
All right, in that case, I'll be sure to enjoy this day
as much as I can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, she has a great time getting to
know her fans better.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Ogurin! Can you do the same pose as my plushie?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Umm...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You mean like this?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: So cute!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, this is kind of embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: But... I guess I don't really mind.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Child A
text_block_list.text: Wow! You're so fast, Ogurin!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Well, I am an Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Would you like to run with me?

text_block_list.name: Child A
text_block_list.text: Can I really?! Yes, please!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Of course you can. Come with me!

text_block_list.name: Child A
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?! Wait, Ogurin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We even have a few special guests.

text_block_list.name: Take
text_block_list.text: Hey, Oguri! Nice to see ya!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You guys... I can't believe you're all here!

text_block_list.name: Yone
text_block_list.text:
When your trainer over there told us to swing by,
we hopped on the first bullet train here!

text_block_list.name: Tome
text_block_list.text: I brought you some of your favorite rice balls!

text_block_list.name: Shige
text_block_list.text:
We're here today as your fans, so make sure to
have fun with us too!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's have fun!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Looks like you're gettin' pumped up!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama! Inari! And Creek too!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
This is your big moment, Oguri! I wouldn't miss it
for the world!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If you ever need a hand with anything, I'm always
more than happy to help. You know where to find
me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To finish the event off, Oguri Cap insists on
putting on a concert.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much for today. Actually, no—thank you for being there for me every day.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Back when I first came to the city, I couldn't tell
left from right. But you were there to guide me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've always struggled with picking up my pace and
making progress, but even when things felt
hopeless, you patiently walked this path together
with me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: And well... Look at how far we've come.

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Oguri! Oguri! Oguri! Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: All these people supporting me—supporting us.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Are you... glad to have been my trainer?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Did you have fun supporting me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's only one answer to that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Let's keep striving toward our next dream. As
long as there are people supporting me...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I wanna keep running—but not just for my fans. I
wanna keep running for the one who's always
shown me so much love—for you!
